docket_entries.description: CONSTRUCTION, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78038370) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CINCINNATI INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TOBONI GROUP LLC , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-27-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-23-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-04-2026 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 78038370) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CINCINNATI INSURANCE COMPANY
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 78038370) TO PLAINTIFF CINCINNATI INSURANCE COMPANY
NOTICE OF RELATED CASE (TRANSACTION ID # 78121767) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CINCINNATI INSURANCE COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78148967) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CINCINNATI INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-07-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT TOBONI GROUP LLC , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

ORDER DESIGNATING CASE COMPLEX AND CONSOLIDATING CASE (TRANSACTION ID # 78337423).
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-27-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NUMBER CGC-24-620871. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
